case_title: HALPER JANICE R VS KENNEDY MIKE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY HALPER JANICE R AS TO DEFENDANT KENNEDY MIKE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-02-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
